power.chaos_addon.blood_smith.blood_bank: Incoming damage converts to blood charges (1❤ = 2 charges). Max 100 charges. At full charges for 30s, you explode for 8 damage.
power.chaos_addon.blood_smith.blood_armo: Regenerates an Absorption shield every 10s, scaling with current charges.
power.chaos_addon.blood_smith.survival_i: Below 3 hearts, gain Speed III. All abilities cost half charges.
power.chaos_addon.blood_smith.no_natural: Natural food regeneration is disabled. Only potions and explicit heals work.
power.chaos_addon.necrovore.soul_drop.de: Killing mobs within 15 blocks yields 1 soul (max 50). Gain max HP based on soul count. Die and lose half your souls.
power.chaos_addon.necrovore.undead_diplo: Nearby undead mobs follow you and won't attack. Up to 10 can become followers.
Poison heals you instead of hurting. Fire deals double damage. Kills restore 1 food point.
power.chaos_addon.swarm_lord.bug_swarm.d: Silverfish orbit and attack your enemies. Evolve through 3 tiers by earning kills: Silverfish → Cave Spider → Spider.
power.chaos_addon.swarm_lord.swarm_sense: Highlight low-HP enemies with Glowing. See their HP in their name.
power.chaos_addon.swarm_lord.royal_phero: Arthropod mobs follow you. Killing arthropods spawns a bonus bug.
power.chaos_addon.swarm_lord.swarm_shiel: Your bugs absorb incoming damage. Heavy hits sacrifice a bug.
power.chaos_addon.biomorph.rapid_adaptat: Absorb the biome's traits over time. Effects strengthen with prolonged exposure. Unlock permanent DNA bonuses.
power.chaos_addon.biomorph.transition_sh: Changing biomes briefly weakens you. The shock diminishes with more DNA unlocked.
power.chaos_addon.ancient_sentinel.stone: Standing on stone or deepslate gives Resistance. Regenerate slowly while on stone.
power.chaos_addon.ancient_sentinel.earth: While standing still on the ground, detect nearby players' footsteps within 50 blocks.
power.chaos_addon.lunar_renegade.lunar_c: Your power waxes and wanes with the moon. Full moon: massive offense. New moon: maximum defense. Perform Moon Rituals for permanent buffs.
power.chaos_addon.wandering_gardener.gre: Regenerate HP when standing on grass or leaves. Heal faster on flowers. Desert and stone drain your hunger.
power.chaos_addon.wandering_gardener.flo: Nearby crops and saplings grow automatically. Place plant traps that poison enemies on contact.
power.chaos_addon.deep_navigator.spatial: Each dimension you visit grants a permanent bonus. Mastering all three removes dimension fatigue.
power.chaos_addon.deep_navigator.portal_: After travelling through a portal, all nearby entities glow for 5 seconds. Transitioning dimensions causes brief fatigue until mastered.
power.chaos_addon.star_oracle.star_fores: Detect mobs targeting you within 10 blocks with a particle warning ring. Celestial events occur at specific moon phases.
advancement.chaos_addon.root.title: Chaos Origins
advancement.chaos_addon.root.description: You have chosen a Chaos Origin.
advancement.chaos_addon.blood_overload.d: As a Blood Smith, survive at 100 charges for 29 seconds.
advancement.chaos_addon.soul_totem.title: Immortal Vessel
advancement.chaos_addon.soul_totem.descr: As a Necrovore, prevent death with a Soul Totem.
advancement.chaos_addon.moon_ritual.desc: Complete a Moon Ritual under a full or new moon.
advancement.chaos_addon.dna_collected.de: As a Biomorph, unlock 5 different DNA strands.
advancement.chaos_addon.dimension_master: As a Deep Navigator, visit all three major dimensions.
advancement.chaos_addon.tier3_progressio: Reach Progression Tier 3 with any origin.
